net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util

Class SimulationResultLogger

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util.SimulationResultLogger

  • public class SimulationResultLogger
extends java.lang.Object
    This class is used to handle passenger data and to analyze and export it.
    Since:
    0.5
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SimulationResultLogger()
      Instantiates a new simulation result logger.

    • Method Detail

      • getSimulationData

        public void getSimulationData(Cabin cabin,
                              int runNumber,
                              double time,
                              int waymakingSkipped,
                              int waymakingCompleted)
        Gets the simulation data.
        Parameters:
        cabin - the cabin
        runNumber - the run number
        time - the time
        waymakingSkipped - the waymaking skipped
        waymakingCompleted - the waymaking completed

      • getPassengerData

        Parameters:
        paxList - the pax list

        Prints the passenger evaluation.

      • printSimulationData
